Contactez nous via le numéro vert dédié: Contact us via the dedicated toll-free number
Landing description: Instituted by presidential decree, the 4th General Population and Housing Census (GPHC) aims to provide exhaustive data on the population to better plan Cameroon's development. The census is everyone's business: let's contribute to its success because every inhabitant counts!
A Propos footer: The General Population and Housing Census is an operation that consists of collecting data on the demographic, cultural, and economic characteristics, as well as the housing and living environment of individuals.
La phase préparatoire: The preparatory phase of the 4th GPHC and GALC mobilizes all technical and logistical resources.
La collecte des données: Field data collection allows for precise mapping of the Cameroonian population.
Des experts s'attellent: Experts are working on the rigorous analysis of collected data for optimal planning.
La publication officielle: Official publication of final results to inform public development policies.
Consultez les étapes: See the key steps of the census process and real-time tracking of each project phase.
Le Ministre de l'Économie: The Minister of Economy chaired the launching ceremony of the pilot census.
Le Gouverneur de la région: The Governor of the Center region informs the population that census teams are now active.
L'INS annonce l'achèvement: INS announces the completion of the mapping phase, with 98% of enumeration areas delimited.
Rapport préliminaire de la phase de cart: Preliminary report of the mapping phase
L'Institut National de la Statistique pu: The National Institute of Statistics publishes the preliminary report of the mapping phase.
Annonce défilement: ⚠️ The 4th General Population and Housing Census (GPHC) is underway in Cameroon — Be counted to build our country's future!       ⚠️ Participate massively in the enumeration for precise planning of national development.
Mobilisation Info: More than 30,000 census agents mobilized across the national territory
Technologie Info: 100% digital collection technology for maximum reliability
Planification Info: Strategic planning based on reliable demographic data
Dénombrement National desc: National collection across the entire territory (2025).
Analyse et Publication desc: Data processing and dissemination of final results (2026).
Social post content: Together for development! The census helps adjust public health and education services...
Portail officiel description: Official portal of the 4th General Population and Housing Census (GPHC) and GALC in Cameroon.
Apropos description: Discover the stakes, objectives, and organization of the 4th General Population and Housing Census (GPHC) in Cameroon.
Comprendre les enjeux: Understanding the stakes, objectives, and organization of the 4th General Population and Housing Census (GPHC).
Pourquoi desc: The census is a fundamental planning tool. It allows knowing precisely the number of inhabitants and their socio-economic characteristics to better adapt public services (health, education, infrastructure).
BUCREP desc: The Central Bureau of Censuses and Population Studies (BUCREP).
Activites description: Check the official schedule and follow the evolution of the various phases of the 4th GPHC in Cameroon.
Dénombrement principal desc: This phase consists of collecting socio-demographic data from every household across the entire national territory.
Actualites description: Discover the latest official statements, activities, and reports of the national census in Cameroon.
Toute l'actualité du Recensement au Came: All the latest news about the Census in Cameroon
Le Gouverneur informe: The Governor informs the population that the teams are active.
L'INS annonce l'achèvement de la phase: INS announces the completion of the mapping phase.
L'Institut National de la Statistique pu: The National Institute of Statistics publishes the report.
Déploiement des équipes techniques: Deployment of technical teams on the field.
Séminaire de formation intensive: Intensive training seminar for future agents.
Le chronogramme complet des activités: The complete schedule of activities for 2024-2025.
Démarrage officiel du dénombrement: Official start of enumeration: what you need to know
Article content p1: The Governor of the Center region informs the populations that the census teams are now active on the field as part of the 4th General Population and Housing Census (GPHC) and the General Agriculture and Livestock Census (GALC).
Article content p2: This large-scale national operation aims to collect precise data to guide development policies. All inhabitants are invited to give a warm welcome to the census agents equipped with their official badge and vest.
Article quote: The success of this census depends on the sincerity of your answers. Your participation is a civic act for the future of Cameroon.
Article footer: The collected data remains strictly confidential and will be used only for statistical purposes.
Le 4ème Recensement Général de la Popula: The 4th General Population and Housing Census is a crucial step for the development of Cameroon.
Votre participation permet une meilleure: Your participation allows for better planning of health, education, and transportation infrastructure.
Nous utilisons des outils numériques de: We use state-of-the-art digital tools to guarantee the reliability and security of your data.
Explorez les données statistiques et le: Explore statistical data and the deployment of census agents in the 10 regions of Cameroon via our interactive map. Hover over a region for more details.
Sélectionnez une région sur la carte: Select a region on the map
